findings.title: Schema drop hides failed review output
findings.body: Malformed findings must fail the schema gate instead of disappearing from the scorecard.

findings.title: Calibration report must stay uncalibrated
findings.body: The public confidence claim must remain uncalibrated until enough human labels exist.

findings.title: Provider timeout must record failed row
findings.body: A provider timeout must record a failed row so coverage audit can backfill the missed pull request.

findings.title: Eval docs omit merged fix evidence
findings.body: Historical replay docs should name the merged fix evidence used as a comparison baseline.
